subcodes.first_line: O thou branch that hath grown upon the blessed Tree! In these times, be thou under the protection, shelter and safeguarding [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع المتصاعد علی السدره المبارکه در این اوقات در حفظ و حمایت و صیانت
subcodes.subjects: @exalting the Word of God in teaching the Cause, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
